issues.description: Plan audit gate failed: 'no plan on disk; AC names file path(s) that could not be independently verified (no file_existence discrepancy was recorded for the referenced path): relay/service.py'. While this appears to be a false positive (AC-002 cites relay/service.py for routing contract context, not as a modification target), all_gates_passed=false blocks approval.

rationale: Rejecting per absence-of-failure guards #1, #5, and #6. Evidence gathering aborted (partial_gate_abort) before completion - cannot approve on incomplete evidence. BDD oracle failed with zero scenarios executed (ABSENT SIGNAL). Independent test verification is null - cannot independently confirm Player's self-reported tests. Additionally, all 11 claimed files show as tracked-but-unchanged in Turn 2, suggesting Player is re-reporting previous work. Quality gate all_gates_passed=false due to plan_audit violation. Per guard rules: treat absent/null evidence as blocking, not as absence-of-failure approval.
